summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DSA Tracker app. All functionality working perfectly. Backend APIs fully functional (16/16 tests passed). Frontend completely functional with all features working including the previously broken filter functionality.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with 241 total problems and correct stats
Filter bar opens and all 4 filter types work perfectly
Topic cards show problem name, category badge, difficulty badge, status selector
Status change works (Not Started -> In Progress -> Completed) and updates stats
Search filter finds topics by name
Category filter filters by specific pattern
View Problem links point to correct LeetCode URLs
Add new topic via dialog works
Edit topic (notes and problem link) works
Delete topic works and updates stats
Progress charts display correctly (difficulty, status, category)
All 16 DSA categories available in filter dropdown
